base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of clouds_bg_castle_variant — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. Cloud background, castle palette — gray clouds on muted blue sky. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
